note: Honest coverage frontier. status: present = a runnable step drives real code and passes (must name a test); pending = specified behavior whose implementation (core/groundnet envelope + adapter seam) does not exist yet; retrospective_gap = shipped without a driving test (must be zero for governed behavior, INV-22). This is a far-future Draft CONTRACT blocked on the flywheel graduating an artifact, the loadable-not-hardcoded prose migration, and the decision-tracer archive (docs/FEDERATION-VISION.md § 7), so every scenario is pending. Scenarios bind to real code as tasks T-021-* land once this spec graduates from Draft.

scenarios.name: The wisdom-chunk envelope is a versioned signed unit with the stable field set
The two-layer marker keeps every chunk generalizable and the estate-specific layer has no export path
The payload is versioned and evolvable while the envelope stays stable
The producer attestation is a stable pseudonym and reputation accrues to it not an identity
A chunk whose signature does not verify is refused before ingest
Provenance is anchored in a signed append-only transparency log and not a blockchain
The groundnet log extends the local hash-chained governance ledger
Reputation aggregates signed verified-outcome attestations weighted by quality not volume
The adapter seam emits from the generalizable layer and ingests into local re-graduation
An ingested chunk is a subordinate hint that passes the full local gate stack
An ingested chunk re-graduates locally before it earns any local standing
Membership export and consumption are opt-in default-off and authenticated
Consumption is never gated behind contribution and no over-share is required
A node is born groundnet-compatible while the local tracer does not depend on the contract
A shared chunk is treated as unrecallable and the export decision is the last point of control
A replayed or duplicate chunk is rejected by its id and provenance anchor
